description.value:
A powerful bow crafted from layered bone and horn, producing extreme draw weight and punishing impact. Its arrows hit with enough force to send targets sprawling. Requires considerable strength to draw effectively.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d6 (60/240), Piercing. Requires STR 13.
BasicTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee d8, Ranged d10 (60/240), Piercing or Bludgeoning, Knockback, Stagger. Requires STR 13.
MasterTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee d8, Ranged d10 (60/240), Piercing or Bludgeoning, Knockback (enhanced), Stagger. Requires STR 13.
Master PerkWhen an enemy fails their Knockback saving throw, they are pushed 10 feet instead of the normal distance.

rmeData.masterPerk: When an enemy fails their Knockback saving throw, they are pushed 10 feet instead of the standard distance.
